Voici le détail de nos prestations avec: Here is the detail of our services with comparison by subscription
Qu'il s'agisse d'un seul bien ou d'un po: Whether it's a single property or a portfolio spread across multiple cantons, BAT-ID lets you register all your parcels without any limit. Each property is geolocated, referenced and accessible in seconds, from any device. No more scattered registers, manual searches and incomplete data — your real estate portfolio is finally centralised, accurate and always up to date.
Chaque jour, des décisions administrativ: Every day, administrative decisions, public consultations and regulatory changes are published in Swiss official bulletins — federal, cantonal and municipal. Without active monitoring, these publications go unnoticed, sometimes to the detriment of your interests. BAT-ID automatically monitors the legal and land-related environment of your selected parcels and alerts you as soon as a publication concerns you. Passive, continuous protection — with no effort on your part.
Au-delà des bulletins officiels, BAT-ID: Beyond official bulletins, BAT-ID deploys an exploration robot that continuously collects all relevant public information around your parcels: building regulations, public law restrictions (PLR), protected areas, development potential, municipal data. This information is automatically synthesised into clear fact sheets per parcel. You benefit from in-depth knowledge of your property and its regulatory environment, without having to carry out the slightest research yourself.
Photos de chantier, factures d'artisans,: Construction photos, artisan invoices, notarial deeds, lease agreements — managing a property generates a considerable volume of documents. BAT-ID offers you a secure storage space, sized according to your usage, to keep all your documents linked to each parcel. Every file is timestamped, versioned and instantly accessible. Your document memory finally matches the value of your property.
Vous utilisez déjà un service de stockag: Already using an online storage service? BAT-ID natively connects to your existing cloud — kDrive, Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox or Proton Drive — and directly links your documents to your parcels, without forcing you to change your habits. For those who prioritise data sovereignty, Infomaniak's kDrive guarantees hosting entirely in Switzerland, meeting the strictest confidentiality requirements.
Votre patrimoine a de la valeur — vos do: Your property has value — so does your data. The backup package included in your subscription ensures that all your documents, alerts, annotations and property information are regularly and securely backed up. In case of an incident, loss or device change, you'll find your entire BAT-ID space just as you left it. Peace of mind you should never have to neglect.
Que vous soyez une famille souhaitant im: Whether you're a family wanting to involve multiple members in managing a shared estate, or a professional organisation coordinating teams across multiple client portfolios, BAT-ID offers structured collaborative workspaces. Each member has a defined access level — administrator, manager, consultant or reader — and accesses in real time the parcels, documents and alerts relevant to them. Professional workspaces are completely isolated from each other, guaranteeing the confidentiality of each client portfolio.
